entities.name: CROP MICROBIOME
entities.description: The microbial population surrounding a plant, essential for crop development and sustenance

entities.name: CROP DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of plant growth and maturation

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING MICROBES
entities.description: Microbes that act as growth enhancers and disease suppressors in plants

entities.name: GROWTH ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of increasing plant growth and development

entities.name: DISEASE SUPPRESSION
entities.description: The ability to reduce or prevent the occurrence of plant diseases

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural output harvested per unit area

entities.name: NANOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The application of nanotechnological tools in agricultural systems to boost output

entities.name: NANOPARTICLES
entities.description: Small-scale particles that interact with crop microbiomes and plant systems

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacterial systems that promote plant growth and are affected by nanoparticles

entities.name: BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The production of compounds utilizing the crop microbiome

entities.name: ROOT COLONIZING MICROBES
entities.description: Microbes that inhabit the root zone and enhance plant health during stress

entities.name: PLANT HEALTH
entities.description: The overall physiological and biological well-being of the plant

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that cause stress to plants

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Living organisms that cause stress to plants

entities.name: RHIZOBACTERIAL METABOLITES
entities.description: Chemicals produced by rhizobacteria that influence plant health

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SOILS
entities.description: The soil environment where crops are grown and nanoparticles leave a footprint

entities.name: DEFENSE TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the crop microbiome that protect the plant from threats

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The worldwide output of food crops

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand and recover from biotic stress
